blocks.content: After lunch, Shirone walked through the corridors of Delta's main building, lost in thought.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'm a bit uneasy.
It wasn't that he doubted the abilities of Ikael and Ashur, but the future of humanity was at stake.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I have no choice but to trust them. Now I need to focus on strategizing with Tormia.
As he hoped for Wizard's arrival, Satiel approached from the end of the corridor.

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: Shirone.
Their relationship was strained.

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: Where is Ikael?
Shirone remained silent, but Satiel had expected no answer.

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: You know, I have unresolved issues with Ikael. If you tell me where she is, I won't harm you. I might even help.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why?

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: Is it because you still have some affection for me? Or because you already killed me once?
Satiel's eyes hardened.

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: Say what you want. I don't regret my decision. I'd do the same again.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I know, you had no choice.
Her expression didn't change, but her aura wavered.
The only archangel who sided with the Gaians. When Goffin chose Ikael, your sense of betrayal…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What are you trying to say?

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: Because it was irreversible, one mistake led to total ruin. But now it can be undone. I'm alive now.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It can't be undone. Even so, it doesn't change the fact that I drove you to death.

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: I don't blame you.
Satiel bit her lip.

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: Can't we start over? The death of a child must have been a great pain for Ikael, but I'm here now. We can fix this.
The air vibrated.
Satiel's vibration was a reverent, supernatural sound wave.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Undo it? It would be a lie to say Shirone's words didn't shake her, but it was too late.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The way back is just as far.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She was tired, and now what moved her was a will hardened into a mission, even her anger petrified.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Goffin.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If it could be undone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even so, Goffin won't return. Ikael took everything from me.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Satiel.
His voice resonated like thunder, and Satiel frowned.

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: What do you want…
At that moment, two-horned Mara, Gallio appeared beside Satiel.

blocks.speaker: Gallio
blocks.content: I found Ikael!
His eyes, possessing extreme disintegration vision, swirled like a vortex.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You found her?
Even as Satiel turned to him in haste, Shirone couldn't understand the situation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How?

blocks.speaker: Gallio
blocks.content: Ikael!
Satiel's expression filled with malice again, and without waiting, she broke the window and flew out.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Simultaneous event…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone, who intended to use Amy's perception to go there, bit his lip.
Ugh!
Due to the nature of not being able to exist in the same space, the signals were colliding.
Blitz!
As he shouted, Thunder Dragon Blitz appeared, kneeling with a thunderclap.

blocks.speaker: Blitz
blocks.content: You called, Messiah.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Right now…
As Shirone was about to give instructions, he saw hundreds of flashes rising outside the window.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Follow me.
As Shirone leaped out the window, twelve apostles followed.
Aruta and Amy didn't move, but they had already exchanged many moves.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He's coming.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The imaginary Aruta threw a punch, and Amy twisted her body to counterattack.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Failed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Amy's head exploded.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: In thousands of simulations, she had never succeeded in counterattacking.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I can't win.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Uriel's Second Mara was naturally not weak, but his strike surpassed the category of Mara.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'll die.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She hurriedly grasped her faltering energy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Aruta couldn't attack because Amy still had the potential to counterattack.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The moment I waver, it's over.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Only the tight balance, with no margin for error, extended her life.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There's no way to avoid his strike. The energy is so strong it feels certain.
Huuu.
Even as she barely held back tears, time passed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: In her weakening energy, Aruta found an opening.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: His insight, based on a lifetime of understanding martial arts, guided his body.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is the end.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: As Aruta kicked off the ground and charged, Amy felt her consciousness fade.
Ah…
Her mind went blank, and the unavoidable strike approached.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: With no thoughts, even if she died, she couldn't think of the word death.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Therefore…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She was no different from being dead, and Aruta's strike carried that meaning.
Mahaprajna.
When she first opened the realm of fire and lost consciousness, Nane had chanted sutras beside her.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Her consciousness opened, and her red eyes ignited.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Immortal Function.
In her state of forgetting even her own existence, she had become pure fire.
Ignition.
The crimson flames coiled around Aruta's arm, snaking into his mouth and incinerating his insides.
Graaahhh!
Before he could even register the pain, his body evaporated, leaving a massive vortex of fire in his place.
Aaaaahhhh!
Amy wept with overwhelming emotion.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So this is what it was.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She finally understood Shirone's heart, the meaning he had tried to convey.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Burn it all.
The flames, which scorched the vast radius to ashes, exploded outward before disappearing entirely.
At the center of the destruction stood a beautiful figure, her entire body transformed into fire, with her eyes gently closed.
Realizing Aruta's obliteration, Uriel slowly lowered the foot he had aimed at Ikael.

blocks.speaker: Uriel
blocks.content: Stand up.
He hadn't intended to kill her, so Ikael carefully rose to her feet.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: I thought I had thought about this as much as anyone possibly could… but it seems I was mistaken.

blocks.speaker: Uriel
blocks.content: Uriel, that's what it means to have a heart,

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Thoughts are just thoughts. All angels think according to the laws of the universe. But you didn't follow Satiel.

blocks.speaker: Uriel
blocks.content: Because you have a heart. You have the will to change things. Isn't that why you came to me?

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Yes. To destroy you.

blocks.speaker: Uriel
blocks.content: That anger is part of your heart as well. But you're hesitating, aren't you? That hesitation means you haven't fully committed.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Goffin had taught her.

blocks.speaker: Uriel
blocks.content: When you can throw everything away, that's when you'll find your path. Until then—
Ikael!
Leading a host of angels, Satiel descended at terrifying speed, her voice full of wrath.

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: Die!
As soon as she landed, she lunged forward, her fist raised high.
Uriel drew his Paradise Staff.

blocks.speaker: Uriel
blocks.content: What—
Caught off guard, Satiel attempted to brake, but her fist smashed into the staff.
BOOOOM!
The impact unleashed a massive shockwave that swept across the land.

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: What are you doing?

blocks.speaker: Uriel
blocks.content: I was speaking with Ikael.

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: And what were you thinking? I am the archangel now. If you do not obey my command, you too will be considered a traitor.

blocks.speaker: Uriel
blocks.content: Uriel glanced skyward.
Hundreds of angels hovered, activating their Judgement Halos, ready to bombard the ground.

blocks.speaker: Uriel
blocks.content: Looking back at Satiel, he said simply, 'Do as you please.'

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: You—!
As Satiel unleashed her Judgement Halo, Uriel's holy aura spread, forming rings of light.
Between the two archangels, light spiraled, triggering another massive shockwave.
Satiel was hurled back, and Uriel swung his Paradise Staff, casting Ragnarok.

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: Is this what it takes to satisfy you?
Even as lightning crackled and exploded, Satiel didn't attempt to block.

blocks.speaker: Satiel
blocks.content: Instead, she issued a command: 'Kill Ikael!'
BOOOOM!
White lightning erupted above Satiel's head, and hundreds of angels descended to bombard the ground.
The battle of the angels began.
Their clashes, far more advanced than anything humans or Mara could comprehend, shook the earth with each collision of abstract concepts.
Soaring through the sky at incredible speed, the Twelve Apostles called out to the one leading them.

blocks.speaker: Blitz
blocks.content: Messiah!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Understood
The angels' battlefield resembled a disaster one might expect to see in the depths of space.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'll take care of this. Confirm Wizard's safety first. And if possible… check on Ikael and Amy as well.

blocks.speaker: Blitz
blocks.content: Understood.
Blitz, acknowledging Shirone's orders, bowed and led the remaining Apostles as they scattered in all directions.
Meanwhile, Ikael was surrounded by hundreds of angels, fending off their relentless attacks.

blocks.speaker: Ceriel
blocks.content: Respected Ikael.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Why did you abandon us?
Though she was no longer the archangel, the fact that Ikael was the origin of all angels hadn't changed.

blocks.speaker: Ceriel
blocks.content: Because of me.
For a brief moment, she hesitated.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: No, I can't allow this. This is what I've resolved to do. I fight for Shirone.
Her thoughts flashed, but the angels' attacks came even faster, pressing in around her.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ikael!
In the frozen landscape, as if time itself had stopped, a single spark ignited.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What is this?
At the same time as realization dawned, Amy arrived in front of Ikael, her Crimson Eye blazing bright.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Ruby Flame.
A massive sphere of fire, as radiant as the sun, engulfed the area around the angels.
Guhhh!
Shielding his face with the Hand of God, Shirone flinched at the overwhelming heat.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Amy?
The flames undeniably took Amy's form, but their level of power was far beyond anything he had ever seen.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This isn't a physical fire. This is an idea.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Manipulating the very concept of fire, she had seemingly mastered an advanced form of incarnation.
As the sphere of fire dissipated, Amy, back in her human form, turned to Ikael.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Are you okay?
Ikael didn't respond, staring blankly ahead.
Grrrr…
Dozens of angels, caught in the flames, sat collapsed on the ground, their wings of light melted away.
